title: Big Globe - Unwrecked Ships Compatibility
body:
[**Alternative CurseForge Download**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/big-globe-unwrecked-ships-compatibility)

A compatibility mod/datapack for [Unwrecked Ships](https://modrinth.com/datapack/unwrecked-ships), makes all structures generate correctly in [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe)

If you can't locate a structure with /locate, I recommend using mod ([Explorer Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass))
